nasb.text: You shall make loops of blue on the edge of the outermost curtain in the first set, and likewise you shall make them on the edge of the curtain that is outermost in the second set.

esv.text: And you shall make loops of blue on the edge of the outermost curtain in the first set. Likewise you shall make loops on the edge of the outermost curtain in the second set.

cnv.text: 其中一組相連的幔子最後一幅的邊上，你要做藍色的鈕扣；在另一組相連的幔子最後一幅的邊上，你也要這樣做。

ccb.text: 要在每幅大幔子边缘钉上蓝色的扣环，
